name: GRAIL, Inc.
summary: PART I Our Company Our mission is to detect cancer early, when it can be cured. We are an innovative commercial-stage healthcare company focused on shifting the paradigm in early cancer detection at population scale. We believe screening individuals for many types of cancer with a single test represents a significant opportunity to reduce the global burden of cancer.
